since_last: 38% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.84%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.85% · Gold -0.18% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 38% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.84%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.84%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.03%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -6.10%
cards.body: Leaders: BIDU +3.61%, DDOG +1.91%, GOOGL +1.74%, AVAV +1.68%, BABA +1.60%. Laggards: SKHY -6.10%, ARM -4.15%, TSM -3.74%, DELL -3.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.14% at $135.46
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.14% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
